title: Assertion `(p->flags & ~(MEM_Null|MEM_Term|MEM_Subtype|MEM_FromBind |MEM_Dyn|MEM_Ephem|MEM_Static))==0' failed.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE v0(v1 DOUBLE NOT NULL, v2 INTEGER DEFAULT 0);
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE v2 USING fts(v5 STRING, v3 INTEGER);
CREATE TRIGGER before_insert_v0 DELETE ON v0 WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM v2 WHERE v3 IS NOT NULL);
key_bug_features: Trigger before insert on table with virtual table reference
